jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Extramarks - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Extramarks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Extramarks:
Extramarks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Extramarks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
